bus_providers.name: Desh Travel
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Cancellation allowed up to 6 hours before departure. 20% charge applies.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Refund processed within 3-5 business days via bKash or bank transfer.

bus_providers.name: Hanif Enterprise
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 12 hours before departure. 15% charge within 12 hours.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Full refund if cancelled 12+ hours prior. Partial refund (85%) within 12 hours.

bus_providers.name: Ena Paribahan
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Cancellation allowed up to 4 hours before departure. No refund for no-shows.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Refund within 5-7 business days. 10% processing fee applies.

bus_providers.name: Green Line
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure. 25% charge within 24 hours.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Full refund for cancellations 24+ hours prior. Partial refund otherwise.

bus_providers.name: Soudia
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Cancellation allowed up to 2 hours before departure. 30% cancellation fee.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Refund via original payment method within 7 business days.

bus_providers.name: Shyamoli Paribahan
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 8 hours before departure. 20% fee after that.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Refund within 3 business days for online bookings.

bus_providers.name: S.A. Paribahan
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: No cancellation allowed within 3 hours of departure.

bus_providers.name: Royal Coach
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure. No refund within 48 hours.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Full refund if cancelled 48+ hours prior. No refund otherwise.

bus_providers.name: Tk Enterprise
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Cancellation allowed up to 1 hour before departure. 25% fee applies.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Cash refund at terminal or bKash within 5 business days.

bus_providers.name: National Travels
bus_providers.cancellation_policy: Cancellation allowed up to 6 hours before departure. 20% charge applies.
bus_providers.refund_policy: Refund via bKash or bank within 5 business days.

eid_special.note: During Eid-ul-Fitr and Eid-ul-Adha, fare surcharge of 20-30% applies. Book at least 7 days in advance.

student_discount.note: 10% discount on Non-AC tickets for students with valid ID.

group_discount.note: Groups of 10 or more get 15% discount. Contact provider directly.

booking_tips: Book at least 2 days in advance for popular routes like Dhaka-Chattogram and Dhaka-Cox's Bazar.
Night buses (10 PM onwards) are often cheaper and save hotel costs.
AC buses are significantly cooler during April-September (summer season).
Carry your booking ID at all times for verification at the counter.
